pathologies.description: Necrotic/non-enhancing tumor core and enhancing tumor regions
pathologies.clinical_significance: Indicates the solid, metabolically active portion of the tumor. Important for surgical planning and treatment response assessment.

pathologies.description: Complete tumor extent including core, edema, and enhancing regions
pathologies.clinical_significance: Defines the total tumor burden including peritumoral edema. Used for overall tumor staging and monitoring progression.

pathologies.description: Gadolinium-enhancing tumor regions indicating active blood-brain barrier breakdown
pathologies.clinical_significance: Reflects areas of active tumor growth with neovascularization. Key indicator for tumor grading (typically high-grade glioma) and treatment response.
